title: view_data/<id>.json schema
description: Structured plot-ready data emitted alongside every figure. Frozen schema_version=1. Consumed by the dashboard tab to render interactive views client-side, by snapshot tests to compare across renderers, and by author-overlay scripts that want to re-render a figure with hand-tuned styling without re-running the full analysis.

stage_id.description: DAG stage that owns this view. Matches FigureContext.stage_id and the parent runtime/outputs/<stage_id>/ directory.

view_id.description: Figure id this view backs. View ids are scoped per-stage; the same id can mean different things in different stages.

schema_version.description: Hard-pinned at 1. Bumping requires a coordinated dashboard + snapshot-test migration.

data.description: View-specific payload. Shape is owned by the stage module — every figure type defines its own canonical schema (e.g. clustering.umap_by_cluster carries `runs[].{x,y,cluster}`; differential_expression.volcano carries `points[].{log_fc,neg_log10_p,feature,sig}`). The viewer is permissive — fields it doesn't recognize are passed through to the dashboard renderer or ignored by the snapshot test.
